attributes.action: Objection Against New HMOs in SE18/SE2
attributes.additional_details: SE18 and SE2 are experiencing rapid change through the conversion of traditional homes into HMOs, often without sufficient consideration of the impact on local communities. Residents are concerned about increased housing density, parking shortages, and the gradual loss of the family-focused character of our neighbourhoods. We call on the Council to introduce stronger controls and ensure that the needs of long-term residents, families and local businesses are properly protected.
attributes.background: Residents of SE18 and SE2 object to the unchecked growth of HMOs. Our communities are losing family homes, facing increased parking problems, noise, and declining quality of life. We call on the Council to protect established neighbourhoods and put residents before overdevelopment.

rejection.details: This is a local issue and a local authority matter - not the responsibility of the Government.
